text: JD Vance claims: Trump wants the Iranian people to thrive and succeed.
text_zh: JD·万斯声称：特朗普希望伊朗人民能够繁荣昌盛。

text: JD Vance on the Iran talks: I wouldn’t just say things went wrong. I also think things went right. We made a lot of progress...
text_zh: JD·万斯谈及伊朗会谈：我不会仅仅说事情进展不顺。我也认为有些事情进展顺利。我们取得了很大进展……

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Martyr concludes his life with a final prayer, passing the blessings attained with his fighting hands 🤲🏼 to his face that will glow and shine upon the world of the hereafter. As the Quran informs us … إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ لَفِی نَعِیمٍ﴿ ٢٢ ﴾ ‎ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَاۤىِٕكِ یَنظُرُونَ﴿ ٢٣ ﴾ ‎ تَعۡرِفُ فِی وُجُوهِهِمۡ نَضۡرَةَ ٱلنَّعِیمِ﴿ ٢٤ ﴾ Surely the virtuous will be in bliss {22} ˹seated˺ on ˹canopied˺ couches, gazing around {23} You will recognize on their faces the glow of delight {24} Quran: Al-Muṭaffifīn 83, Ayah 22-24
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党烈士以最后的祈祷结束了他的一生，将他那双战斗之手所获得的祝福🤲🏼传递到他那将在来世世界中闪耀光芒的脸上。正如《古兰经》所告知我们的…… إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ لَفِی نَعِیمٍ﴿ ٢٢ ﴾ ‎ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَاۤىِٕكِ یَنظُرُونَ﴿ ٢٣ ﴾ ‎ تَعۡرِفُ فِی وُجُوهِهِمۡ نَضۡرَةَ ٱلنَّعِیمِ﴿ ٢٤ ﴾ 义士们必在恩泽中 {22} 在锦榻上观看 {23} 你从他们的脸上可以认出恩泽的光辉 {24} 《古兰经》：第83章《应称量不公者》，第22-24节

text: WarMonitor Scaramucci says even the AI seemed to dunk on Trump, placing what looked like a “young Epstein” in the image and describing him as “fatigued.” On the war, he says Trump has no strategy, went in with no exit plan, and that if Congress had a backbone, it’d be calling people in. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043814872773702041/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：斯卡拉穆奇说，连人工智能似乎都在嘲讽特朗普，在图像中放入了一个看起来像“年轻时的爱泼斯坦”的人，并将其描述为“疲惫不堪”。关于战争，他说特朗普没有战略，进入时没有撤离计划，如果国会有骨气，就应该传唤相关人员。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043814872773702041/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Eric Swalwell resigns from Congress. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043809997612515764/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：突发——埃里克·斯沃韦尔辞去国会议员职务。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043809997612515764/photo/1 推文

text: At Islamabad talks, the US demanded Iran halt uranium enrichment for 20 years; Iran offered up to five. The US also wants enriched uranium removed, while Iran insists on keeping it but diluting it. Source: NYT
text_zh: 在伊斯兰堡会谈中，美国要求伊朗停止铀浓缩20年；伊朗提议停止最多五年。美国还希望移除浓缩铀，而伊朗坚持保留但进行稀释。来源：《纽约时报》

text: The US and Iran are discussing another round of face-to-face talks to secure a longer-term ceasefire after recent negotiations in Islamabad, led by JD Vance, ended without a deal. Officials hope to meet again before the current two-week ceasefire expires next week, possibly in Islamabad or another location. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 继JD·万斯领导的近期伊斯兰堡谈判无果而终后，美国和伊朗正在讨论进行新一轮面对面会谈，以确保达成更长期的停火协议。官员们希望在下周当前的两周停火期结束前再次会面，地点可能在伊斯兰堡或其他地方。来源：彭博社

text: Hillary Clinton: Israel itself has lived in a very dangerous neighborhood for a very long time. It deserves our support separate and apart from Netanyahu.
text_zh: 希拉里·克林顿：以色列本身长期以来一直生活在一个非常危险的社区。它理应得到我们的支持，这与内塔尼亚胡无关。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇧🇷 ICE arrested former Brazilian Intelligence chief Alexandre Ramagem for illegally being in the U.S. after fleeing Brazil following his conviction of plotting a coup with former Brazilian President Bolsonaro. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇧🇷 美国移民和海关执法局（ICE）逮捕了巴西前情报局长亚历山大·拉马根，原因是他因与巴西前总统博索纳罗密谋政变被定罪后逃离巴西，非法滞留美国。@wfwitness

text: Hillary Clinton: I do support Israel. I am a staunch supporter of Israel. And I am a staunch opponent of Netanyahu. He has stayed too long. He has, in my view, undermined Israel’s long-term security.
text_zh: 希拉里·克林顿：我确实支持以色列。我是以色列的坚定支持者。同时，我是内塔尼亚胡的坚定反对者。他待得太久了。在我看来，他损害了以色列的长期安全。

text: Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-Calif.) said he will resign from Congress amid sexual assault and misconduct allegations and growing bipartisan pressure to step down.
text_zh: 众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（加利福尼亚州民主党人）表示，在性侵犯和不当行为指控以及两党要求其下台的压力日益增加的情况下，他将辞去国会议员职务。

text: WarFront Witness pinned a photo
text_zh: WarFront Witness 置顶了一张照片

text: Netanyahu attacks Europe: Europe has forgotten so many things since the Holocaust. Europe can learn many things from us, and above all — the most important thing: the sharp distinction between good and evil.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡抨击欧洲：自大屠杀以来，欧洲已经忘记了太多事情。欧洲可以从我们这里学到很多东西，最重要的是——最重要的一点：善与恶之间的鲜明界限。

text: Hezbollah Leader Naim Qassem: They say to us: "If you hadn't confronted Israel, we wouldn't have paid these losses." If we hadn't confronted, we would have paid more and lost everything. Do you think that Israel is leaving us? It's the one that is attacking.
text_zh: 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆：他们对我们说：“如果你们没有对抗以色列，我们就不会遭受这些损失。”如果我们没有对抗，我们将付出更多，失去一切。你们认为以色列会放过我们吗？是它在发动攻击。

text: 🇱🇧 Dignified and honorable Hezbollah resistance fighter targeted and martyred by Israeli FPV drone in southern Lebanon These are the young men of Lebanon that lay their lives in the cause of الله (Allah) swt defending their honor and the honor of their people. These are the sons of Husayn (as) and graduates of the school of Karbala Israeli FPV drone view and surveillance drone shown in videos
text_zh: 🇱🇧 尊严且光荣的真主党抵抗战士在黎巴嫩南部被以色列FPV无人机锁定并殉难。这些是黎巴嫩的年轻人，他们为了真主（Allah）的崇高事业献出了生命，捍卫了他们的荣誉和人民的荣誉。他们是侯赛因（愿主福安之）的子孙，是卡尔巴拉学校的毕业生。视频中展示了以色列FPV无人机视角和监视无人机

text: Open Source Intel Trump: For those people that still read The Failing New York Times and, despite the fact that Iran has been totally OBLITERATED, Militarily, and otherwise, you would think that Iran is actually winning or, at the very least, doing quite well — But that’s not true, and The New York Times knows that it’s FAKE NEWS! When does this Corrupt Media Outlet apologize for their LIES and horrible actions against me, my supporters, and our Country itself! HAVE THEY NO SHAME? HAVE THEY NO SENSE OF DECENCY? tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：特朗普：对于那些仍然阅读《失败的纽约时报》的人来说，尽管伊朗在军事上和其他方面已经完全被摧毁，你可能会认为伊朗实际上正在获胜，或者至少表现得相当不错——但事实并非如此，《纽约时报》知道这是假新闻！这个腐败的媒体机构何时为他们对我、我的支持者以及我们国家本身所做的谎言和可怕行为道歉！他们难道没有羞耻心吗？他们难道没有一点正义感吗？推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Energy Secretary Wright said that gas under $3 a gallon by the Summer is an aggressive timeline. Interviewer: "You've sounded more optimistic in past interviews saying you expect gas prices to ease and that there's a good chance that prices could hit under $3 a gallon by the summer. Is that still your belief, particularly given today's blockade in the strait, or has the dynamic changed there?" Wright: "Well, by the summer is an aggressive time frame now. You know, going into this, this is a forty-seven-year-long conflict with Iran that's repeatedly not only been a threat to American soldiers and peace in the Middle East, but also a threat to energy supplies." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国能源部长赖特表示，夏季前油价降至每加仑3美元以下是一个激进的时间表。采访者：“你在过去的采访中听起来更乐观，说你预计油价会回落，并且夏季前油价很有可能降至每加仑3美元以下。考虑到今天海峡的封锁，你仍然持有这种看法吗，还是那里的动态已经改变了？”赖特：“嗯，夏季前现在是一个激进的时间框架。你知道，进入这个阶段，这是与伊朗长达47年的冲突，它不仅一再威胁到美国士兵和中东的和平，还威胁到能源供应。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇸🇾 Reuters: A French court has found cement company Lafarge guilty of financing jihadist groups in Syria, including ISIS and the Nusra Front, to maintain operations during the civil war. The court ruled that Lafarge paid approximately €5.6 million between 2013 and 2014 to armed groups, marking the first time a company has been convicted in France for financing terrorism. Several former executives, including ex-CEO Bruno Lafont, were also convicted, with Lafont sentenced to six years in prison. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇫🇷 🇸🇾 路透社：法国一家法院裁定水泥公司拉法基（Lafarge）在内战期间为维持运营，资助叙利亚的圣战组织（包括ISIS和努斯拉阵线）罪名成立。法院裁定，拉法基在2013年至2014年间向武装组织支付了约560万欧元，这是法国首次有公司因资助恐怖主义被定罪。包括前首席执行官布鲁诺·拉丰在内的几位前高管也被定罪，拉丰被判处六年监禁。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ✍️ The Blockade of Hormuz or the strangling of Iran. After an extensive bombing campaign which mostly failed to achieve any strategic goal, the United States is now resorting to its naval power to close the strait of Hormuz in an attempt to gain leverage on Iran. While Iran's anti-ship missiles, drones and mines have halted oil export from the Gulf state, it was able to export some of its own petroleum to generate valuable revenue. The US has now chosen that cutting Iran's financial lifeline will be worth the negative impact on the global economy. A prolonged blockade can effectively destroy the Iranian economy as a whole, greatly reducing the state power and ability to wage war if the country does not fall into civil war. However if Iran thinks that it won't be able to use the strait anymore there is now nothing holding them back from saturating Hormuz with naval mines, closing it for months, and for everyone, even if the blockade is lifted. This is probably Iran's last and most powerful card left. Iranian tankers could still escape seizure by the US Navy by staying in Iranian then Pakistani territorial waters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ✍️ 霍尔木兹海峡的封锁或对伊朗的扼杀。在经历了一场基本未能实现任何战略目标的广泛轰炸行动后，美国现在正诉诸其海军力量封锁霍尔木兹海峡，试图获得对伊朗的筹码。虽然伊朗的反舰导弹、无人机和水雷已经停止了该海湾国家的石油出口，但它仍能出口部分石油以产生宝贵的收入。美国现在认为，切断伊朗的财政生命线值得付出对全球经济产生负面影响的代价。长期的封锁可以有效地摧毁伊朗的整体经济，如果该国不陷入内战，将大大削弱其国家权力和发动战争的能力。然而，如果伊朗认为它不能再使用该海峡，那么现在没有什么能阻止它用海军水雷填满霍尔木兹海峡，将其关闭数月，对所有人都是如此，即使封锁被解除。这可能是伊朗手中剩下的最后一张也是最强大的牌。伊朗油轮可以通过留在伊朗领海然后进入巴基斯坦领海来逃避美国海军的扣押。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli Flare bombs in the sky of Tyre, Southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Residents of Tyre recorded Israeli flares lighting up the night sky over the city this Monday evening. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列照明弹在黎巴嫩南部提尔市上空。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 提尔市居民记录了本周一晚上以色列照明弹照亮城市夜空的情景。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇧🇷 Brazil’s fugitive former intelligence chief and lawmaker Alexandre Ramagem has been taken into custody by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Ramagem, who faces a 16-year prison sentence in Brazil for his alleged involvement in a coup plot with far-right ex-President Jair Bolsonaro, has been living in exile in Florida in recent months. Journalist Paulo Figueiredo, an ally of Bolsonaro, said Ramagem was detained after a traffic stop and subsequently referred to ICE. He added that Ramagem has legal status in the US and has a pending asylum request under review. Figueiredo told CNN that Immigrex, a company where he is a partner, is providing legal representation to Ramagem. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇧🇷 巴西在逃的前情报局长兼议员亚历山大·拉马根已被美国移民和海关执法局拘留。拉马根因涉嫌与极右翼前总统雅伊尔·博索纳罗密谋政变而在巴西面临16年监禁，近几个月来一直流亡在佛罗里达州。博索纳罗的盟友、记者保罗·菲格雷多表示，拉马根是在一次交通拦截后被拘留，随后被移交给ICE。他补充说，拉马根在美国拥有合法身份，并且有一项正在审查中的庇护申请。菲格雷多告诉CNN，他作为合伙人的Immigrex公司正在为拉马根提供法律代理。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump attacked the New York Times over their coverage of the conflict with Iran, calling them fake news. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普抨击《纽约时报》对伊朗冲突的报道，称其为假新闻。@wfwitness

text: Hezbollah Leader Naim Qassem: They say to us: "If you hadn't confronted Israel, we wouldn't have paid these losses." If we hadn't confronted, we would have paid more and lost everything. Do you think that Israel is leaving us? It's the one that is attacking.
text_zh: 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆：他们对我们说：“如果你们没有对抗以色列，我们就不会遭受这些损失。”如果我们没有对抗，我们将付出更多，失去一切。你们认为以色列会放过我们吗？是它在发动攻击。

text: 🇮🇱 Retired Israeli Major General Yitzhak Brik aka Israel's "prophet of wrath" who warned of vulnerabilities before October 7th, assessed the strategic situation as "very bad." "On the morning of April 4th he says he will destroy their civilization to the ground. At eight o'clock in the evening, he says ceasefire, negotiations. Essentially Trump surrendered." The goal of overthrowing the Iranian regime failed. As long as they remain in power, they can rehabilitate themselves. Netanyahu wants to finish off the whole world, but he doesn't have an army capable of doing what he claims. "We never had absolute victory. There won't be absolute victory, certainly not in these conditions. We didn't defeat Hamas. We didn't defeat Hezbollah. We didn't defeat the Iranians." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 以色列退役少将伊扎克·布里克，又名以色列的“愤怒先知”，他在10月7日之前就警告过脆弱性，他评估战略局势为“非常糟糕”。“4月4日早上，他说他将把他们的文明彻底摧毁。晚上八点，他说停火，谈判。本质上特朗普投降了。”推翻伊朗政权的计划失败了。只要他们继续掌权，他们就能恢复元气。内塔尼亚胡想消灭全世界，但他没有能力实现他所声称的目标的军队。“我们从未取得绝对胜利。不会有绝对胜利，当然在这种条件下不会有。我们没有击败哈马斯。我们没有击败真主党。我们没有击败伊朗人。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @Osint613 : New Hungarian PM Peter Magyar on relations with Israel: "I cannot guarantee that Hungary will continue to block EU decisions regarding Israel. As in any other case, each issue and each decision will be examined on its merits. However, I do not want to predetermine a position on the subject. We will see what decisions the union will make, and we will examine what serves the interests and justice." tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @Osint613：匈牙利新任总理彼得·马贾尔谈及与以色列的关系：“我不能保证匈牙利将继续阻止欧盟关于以色列的决定。正如在任何其他情况下一样，每个问题和每个决定都将根据其自身优点进行审查。然而，我不想预先确定关于该主题的立场。我们将看看欧盟会做出什么决定，我们将审查什么符合利益和正义。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @NadavPollak : Another step in Bibi’s mission to ruin every good place that we still have in Israel NEW MOSSAD CHIEF is Roman Gofman, currently Israeli PM Netanyahu's military secretary. It's an unusual move for an outsider appointment, but Meir Dagan pulled it off in 2002. - Yonah Jeremy Bob tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @NadavPollak：这是比比（内塔尼亚胡）摧毁我们在以色列仍然拥有的每一个好地方的任务中的又一步。新任摩萨德局长是罗曼·戈夫曼，目前是以色列总理内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书。对于外部任命来说，这是一个不寻常的举动，但梅尔·达甘在2002年做到了。 - Yonah Jeremy Bob 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : Orban's foreign minister offered Iran's assistance after Israel blew the balls off Hezbollah operatives. “Our secret service has already contacted your services and we will share all the information we have gathered during the investigation,” Peter Szijjarto told Abbas Araghchi, per @AineBelton 's reporting: https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2026/04/08/hungary-iran-hezbollah-trump-orban/ I want to express my deep appreciation to my dear friend @PM_ViktorOrban , a true friend of Israel, who stood firmly by Israel's side in the face of unjust international vilification and who supported Israel's soldiers in our just war of self-defense against brutal terrorists. The people of Israel will forever remember this. I congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory. I wish him success in leading Hungary forward, while strengthening the strong ties between our nations. I look forward to continuing our cooperation for the benefit of both our peoples. - Benjamin Netanyahu - בנימין נתניהו tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss：在以色列炸掉真主党特工的蛋蛋后，欧尔班的外交部长向伊朗提供了援助。“我们的特勤局已经联系了你们的服务部门，我们将分享我们在调查期间收集的所有信息，”彼得·西雅尔多告诉阿巴斯·阿拉格奇，据 @AineBelton 的报道：https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2026/04/08/hungary-iran-hezbollah-trump-orban/ 我想向我亲爱的朋友 @PM_ViktorOrban 表示深深的感谢，他是以色列真正的朋友，在面对不公正的国际诽谤时坚定地站在以色列一边，并支持以色列士兵在针对残酷恐怖分子的正义自卫战争中。以色列人民将永远记住这一点。我祝贺彼得·马贾尔赢得选举胜利。我祝愿他在领导匈牙利前进的同时，加强我们两国之间的牢固联系。我期待着继续我们的合作，造福我们两国人民。 - 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡 - בנימין נתניהו 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 DoorDash's market cap has risen by roughly $1.87 billion since Trump received his McDonald's delivery at the Oval Office today. WILD FOOTAGE 🔴 President Trump had McDonald’s delivered to the Oval Office via DoorDash, right before his presser. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043735877692572068/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：突发 🔴 自特朗普今天在椭圆形办公室收到麦当劳外卖以来，DoorDash的市值上涨了约18.7亿美元。疯狂的画面 🔴 特朗普总统在新闻发布会前通过DoorDash将麦当劳送到了椭圆形办公室。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043735877692572068/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: NEW: The U.S. Navy is moving multiple minesweeping ships from the Pacific toward the Middle East, signaling preparations for a large-scale operation to clear Iranian naval mines from the Strait of Hormuz. SOURCE
text_zh: 最新消息：美国海军正在将多艘扫雷舰从太平洋移向中东，标志着为大规模清除霍尔木兹海峡伊朗水雷的行动做准备。来源

text: Trump: For those people that still read The Failing New York Times and, despite the fact that Iran has been totally OBLITERATED, Militarily, and otherwise, you would think that Iran is actually winning or, at the very least, doing quite well — But that’s not true, and The New York Times knows that it’s FAKE NEWS! When does this Corrupt Media Outlet apologize for their LIES and horrible actions against me, my supporters, and our Country itself! HAVE THEY NO SHAME? HAVE THEY NO SENSE OF DECENCY?
text_zh: 特朗普：对于那些仍然阅读《失败的纽约时报》的人来说，尽管伊朗在军事上和其他方面已经完全被摧毁，你可能会认为伊朗实际上正在获胜，或者至少表现得相当不错——但事实并非如此，《纽约时报》知道这是假新闻！这个腐败的媒体机构何时为他们对我、我的支持者以及我们国家本身所做的谎言和可怕行为道歉！他们难道没有羞耻心吗？他们难道没有一点正义感吗？

text: 🇺🇸 Trump lashes out at The New York Times over its reporting on the war with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普因《纽约时报》对伊朗战争的报道而对其进行抨击。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 — Trump attacks the media for saying he’s losing in Iran, calling it “fake news” and asking, “have they no shame? have they no sense of decency?”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 — 特朗普抨击媒体称他在伊朗战败，称其为“假新闻”，并问道：“他们难道没有羞耻心吗？他们难道没有一点正义感吗？”

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 The USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar. It is now the third U.S. aircraft carrier entering the Iran theater. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 According to USNI News—the media arm of the U.S. Naval Institute—the USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) is operating off Namibia, taking an unusual route around Africa to join a growing U.S. naval buildup in the Arabian Sea amid a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Instead of transiting the Strait of Gibraltar and Mediterranean, the strike group—escorted by USS Donald Cook (DDG-75), USS Mason (DDG-87), USS Ross (DDG-71), and supported by USNS Arctic (TAOE-8)—is bypassing the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. ℹ️ Earlier today, some reports said it had crossed Gibraltar; however, this now appears not to be the case. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 美国乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）已经穿过直布罗陀海峡。它现在是第三艘进入伊朗战区的美国航空母舰。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 据美国海军研究所的媒体机构USNI News报道，乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）正在纳米比亚附近海域行动，采取了一条不寻常的绕非洲航线，以加入美国在阿拉伯海日益增长的海军集结，背景是美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。该打击群没有通过直布罗陀海峡和地中海，而是在唐纳德·库克号驱逐舰（DDG-75）、梅森号驱逐舰（DDG-87）、罗斯号驱逐舰（DDG-71）的护航下，并由北极号补给舰（TAOE-8）支持，绕过了红海和曼德海峡。ℹ️ 今天早些时候，一些报道称它已经穿过了直布罗陀；然而，这似乎并非事实。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 German Chancellor Merz expressed concern to Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu about recent events in the West Bank, urging that there must be no annexation of the West Bank. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 德国总理默茨向以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表达了对西岸近期事件的担忧，敦促不得吞并西岸。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A meeting is scheduled to be held tomorrow in Washington between the Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors to the United States at 6:00 PM Beirut time, with the United States Secretary of State expected to join for a few minutes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩和以色列驻美国大使定于明天下午6:00（贝鲁特时间）在华盛顿举行会议，预计美国国务卿将加入几分钟。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇮🇷 The number of ships transits between Kharg island and mainland Iran has remained high despite the ongoing ceasefire. Satellite imagery from April 6th and 11th showed 7 and 28 ships respectively. This is down from the peak of the war (33) but still significantly above usual numbers. The IRGC is expected to continue the renforcement of the island as the threat of the return of the war looms over the region. This is not the daily number of transits but the number of ships seen at once on the satellite imagery . @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇮🇷 尽管停火仍在持续，但哈尔克岛与伊朗大陆之间的船只往来数量仍然很高。4月6日和11日的卫星图像分别显示有7艘和28艘船只。这低于战争高峰期（33艘），但仍显著高于通常数字。随着战争回归的威胁笼罩该地区，预计伊斯兰革命卫队将继续加强该岛的防御。这不是每日的往来数量，而是卫星图像上一次看到的船只数量。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Heavy Israeli airstrikes have targeted the city of Tyre a few moments ago. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli Flare bombs in the sky of Tyre, Southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列重型空袭刚刚袭击了提尔市。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列照明弹在黎巴嫩南部提尔市上空。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷The USS George H.W. Bush has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar enroute to the Middle East. This picture is old. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 USNI News: The USS George H.W. Bush didn’t sail through the Strait of Gibraltar to the Mediterranean, but rather the aircraft carrier will sail around Africa to avoid sailing through the Red Sea and the Bab el-Mandeb. Both of these areas would put aircraft carrier at risk of attack from Houthi drones or missiles. A notice to mariners states that a “grace period” allowing neutral vessels to leave Iranian ports has ended, warning that any ship entering or departing the blockaded area without authorisation may face interception, diversion, or capture. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰已穿过直布罗陀海峡前往中东。这张照片是旧的。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 USNI News：乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰没有穿过直布罗陀海峡进入地中海，而是将绕非洲航行，以避免通过红海和曼德海峡。这两个区域都会使航空母舰面临胡塞武装无人机或导弹攻击的风险。一份海员通知称，允许中立船只离开伊朗港口的“宽限期”已经结束，警告任何未经授权进入或离开被封锁区域的船只可能面临拦截、改道或扣押。@wfwitness
